title: Company Overview & Mission
body: Cengage partners with institutions to deliver affordable, outcomes-focused digital learning. Our courseware and platforms are built to improve student engagement, retention, and completion at scale.

title: Higher Education Solution Summary
body: For colleges and universities, we provide integrated digital courseware, MindTap learning paths, and LMS integration (Canvas, Blackboard, Brightspace, Moodle) that reduce material costs for students while giving faculty real-time insight into learning outcomes.

title: K-12 Solution Summary
body: For K-12 districts, we deliver standards-aligned digital content, teacher dashboards, and district-wide reporting designed to support differentiated instruction and measurable proficiency gains.

title: Workforce & Corporate Training Summary
body: For workforce and corporate learning, we offer skills-based content, certification-prep pathways, and completion analytics that tie learning investment to measurable upskilling outcomes.

title: Implementation & Onboarding Plan
body: A typical rollout runs on a phased 60-90 day plan: LMS integration and SSO in phase one, faculty enablement and content mapping in phase two, and full learner go-live with support in phase three. A dedicated onboarding manager coordinates each phase.

title: Support & Success Model
body: Every institution is assigned a Customer Success Manager and access to 24/7 learner technical support, faculty training resources, and quarterly business reviews to track adoption and outcomes.

title: Security, Privacy & Accessibility
body: Our platforms are FERPA-aligned, support WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, and use encryption in transit and at rest. Data privacy terms and accessibility conformance reports are available on request.

title: Outcomes & Case Evidence
body: Institutions using our integrated courseware commonly report improved course completion and reduced student material costs. Reference case studies for comparable institutions are available during evaluation.

title: Pricing & Commercial Terms
body: Pricing is structured on an annual per-learner subscription with volume tiers, multi-year discounts, and optional professional-services packages. Final commercial terms are confirmed by the Account Executive based on enrollment and term length.

title: RFP Compliance Statement
body: We confirm the ability to meet standard procurement requirements including data-privacy terms, accessibility conformance, implementation timelines, and multi-year agreement structures as specified in the solicitation.
